Your edits, comments, and exclusions — paste this back into Claude to rebuild the report. Untouched items are omitted.

Two-person cross-gender sync. Per-line voice-gender tags (m/f) pinned every (f) line to Ana and (m) to Bogdan, so speaker attribution is reliable (2 speakers, no phantoms). Gemini transcribed cleanly: repairs were light — “Cloud”→“Claude”, “coluiesc”→“call” workflows (confirmed), and dropping the pre-meeting setup/audio chatter.

Phase-1 repairs. Green = applied · amber = confirm · red = needs you.
